name: mustardscript
description: Sandboxed, subset JavaScript runtime for Node services.

scripts.install: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const cp=require('node:child_process'); if (!fs.existsSync('dist/install.js')) { cp.execFileSync(process.execPath, ['scripts/build-ts-dist.ts'], { stdio: 'inherit' }); } cp.execFileSync(process.execPath, ['dist/install.js'], { stdio: 'inherit' });"
scripts.build: node scripts/build-ts-dist.ts && napi build --platform --manifest-path crates/mustard-node/Cargo.toml --js-package-name mustardscript --output-dir . --no-js
scripts.test: npm run build && node --test tests/node/**/*.test.js && npm run test:types && npm run test:package-smoke
scripts.test:conformance: npm run test:differential && npm run test:test262
scripts.bench:smoke:dev: npm run build && node --expose-gc benchmarks/smoke.ts --profile dev
scripts.bench:smoke:release: node scripts/build-ts-dist.ts && napi build --platform --release --manifest-path crates/mustard-node/Cargo.toml --js-package-name mustardscript --output-dir . --no-js && node --expose-gc benchmarks/smoke.ts --profile release
scripts.bench:workloads:dev: node scripts/build-ts-dist.ts && napi build --platform --manifest-path crates/mustard-node/Cargo.toml --js-package-name mustardscript --output-dir . --no-js && cargo build -q -p mustard-sidecar && node --expose-gc benchmarks/workloads.ts --profile dev
scripts.bench:workloads:release: node scripts/build-ts-dist.ts && napi build --platform --release --manifest-path crates/mustard-node/Cargo.toml --js-package-name mustardscript --output-dir . --no-js && cargo build -q --release -p mustard-sidecar && node --expose-gc benchmarks/workloads.ts --profile release
